title: Key strength validation — weak key
description: A short key should return warnings
clause: GA-01-REQ-05: Keys shorter than 32 bytes MUST produce warnings

title: Key expiry — expired key returns status tuple
description: check_key_expiry with a past date must return ('expired', days)
clause: GA-01-REQ-06: check_key_expiry MUST return a (status, days) tuple

title: derive_key with context produces different output
description: derive_key with and without context must produce different keys
clause: GA-01-REQ-07: derive_key context parameter MUST produce isolation between environments
